creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

One day, you'll realize that reports that do not contain any useful 
information with which the people who'd like to help out can debug 
a problem are quite frustrating todeal with. :-) 

For now, take it from me;  there's nothing we can do with this PR. 

When you ask your question on the freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org 
mailing list, please be sure to supply an exact list of Perl modules 
which your script uses, as well as the error messages it generates.
